name: Chocolate Mint Meringue Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, margarine and sugar; press onto bottom of 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. Combine cream cheese and sugar, mixing on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in mint chocolate and vanilla; pour over crust.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 50 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim. Chill.
4. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add marshmallow creme, beating until stiff peaks form. Carefully spread over top of cheesecake to seal. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 3 to 4 minutes or until lightly browned.
